memoryArtifacts.description: Eilean Donan Castle is a small tidal island where three sea lochs meet Loch Duich, Loch Long, and Loch Alsh, Highlands, Scotand. https://pin.it/43Fh9OT

memoryArtifacts.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
memoryArtifacts.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

Died: March 18, 1293 (45-53) in Canterbury, Kent, England …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail於1240年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Angus Crom MacKenneth40歲，母親Sybella Stewart35歲。他於大約1269年與Lady Morna MacDougall在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1304年在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

zh-hans.Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾廷哈梅
zh-hans.Ardchattan Priory, Ardchattan, Argyll, S: 苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾哈坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail于1240年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲Angus Crom MacKenneth40岁，母亲Sybella Stewart35岁。他于大约1269年与Lady Morna MacDougall在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1304年在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

nameMeanings.name: MacKenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Kenneth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

variants.name: Kennith
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail was born in 1240, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Angus Crom MacKenneth, was 40 and his mother, Sybella Stewart, was 35. He married Lady Morna MacDougall about 1269, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1304, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail est né en 1240, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Angus Crom MacKenneth, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sybella Stewart, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Morna MacDougall environ 1269, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1304, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Ardchattan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail 1240 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Angus Crom MacKenneth 40 und seine Mutter Sybella Stewart 35. Er hat um 1269 in Scotland Lady Morna MacDougall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail è nato il nel 1240 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Angus Crom MacKenneth, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sybella Stewart, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Morna MacDougall circa 1269, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1304, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintailが1240年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Angus Crom MacKennethは40歳，母Sybella Stewartは35歳であった。約1269年にスコットランドでLady Morna MacDougallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1304年に故郷で64歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアルドチャッタンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail(이)가 1240년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Angus Crom MacKenneth(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybella Stewart(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1269년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Morna MacDougall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1304년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 아드차탠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail nasceu em 1240, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Angus Crom MacKenneth, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sybella Stewart, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Morna MacDougall aproximadamente 1269, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1304, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail родился в 1240 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Angus Crom MacKenneth было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybella Stewart, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Morna MacDougall около 1269 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1304 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ардчаттань, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail nació en 1240, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Angus Crom MacKenneth, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sybella Stewart, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Morna MacDougall aproximadamente 1269, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1304, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.
